title: senecio dubius
intro: Senecio dubius, also known as the 'False Geranium', is a plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its distinctive foliage and vibrant flowers. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are known to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Senecio dubius may help alleviate symptoms of various health issues, such as digestive problems, arthritis, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Senecio dubius can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
